title: cyperus obtusatus var. tenuis
intro: Cyperus obtusatus var. tenuis is a variant of the Cyperus obtusatus plant, belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus obtusatus var. tenuis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating digestive problems like diarrhea and dyspepsia. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots are often used in traditional medicine to extract its active compounds.
